# Dar Al-Maarifa E-Book Store

> Arabic RTL e-book store with 10 expertly crafted titles in leadership, business, productivity, and self-development. Bilingual (AR/EN).

## Books
- [The Influential Leader]( https://ansygroup.github.io/ebook-store/book/the-influential-leader) — A practical guide to developing leadership that inspires your team and builds a high-performance culture. ($19.99)
- [Build Your Empire]( https://ansygroup.github.io/ebook-store/book/build-your-empire) — A complete roadmap to launch your startup and grow it to profitability. ($24.99)
- [Deep Productivity]( https://ansygroup.github.io/ebook-store/book/deep-productivity) — A work style focused on depth over fake busyness that doubles your output. ($14.99)
- [Design Your Mindset]( https://ansygroup.github.io/ebook-store/book/design-your-mindset) — Reprogram your limiting beliefs and build a growth mindset that never stops learning. ($12.99)
- [Tech for Everyone]( https://ansygroup.github.io/ebook-store/book/tech-for-everyone) — Understand the basics of programming and AI without a technical background. ($17.99)
- [Health Without Limits]( https://ansygroup.github.io/ebook-store/book/health-without-limits) — An integrated lifestyle system for energy, focus, and sustainable wellbeing. ($9.99)
- [The Art of Negotiation]( https://ansygroup.github.io/ebook-store/book/art-of-negotiation) — Learn the art of persuasion and agreement with confidence at work and in daily life. ($15.99)
- [Smart Investing]( https://ansygroup.github.io/ebook-store/book/smart-investing) — Fundamentals of building long-term wealth with disciplined, thoughtful steps. ($21.99)
- [Content Craft]( https://ansygroup.github.io/ebook-store/book/content-writing) — Write content that sells and builds a loyal audience around your brand. ($13.99)
- [Learn Languages]( https://ansygroup.github.io/ebook-store/book/learn-languages) — A practical method to master any language in record time without a teacher. ($11.99)

## Pages
- [Home](https://ansygroup.github.io/ebook-store/)
